Services Agreement — ACME Corp and Widget Inc: This Services Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of November 1, 2023, between ACME Corporation ("Client") and Widget Inc ("Provider"). Provider agrees to deliver software development services as described in Exhibit A, with delivery milestones specified in the attached Statement of Work. Payment terms are net-30 from invoice date, with a 1.5% monthly late fee applied to overdue balances. This Agreement shall govern all engagements between the parties for a period of two years and may be renewed by mutual written consent.
